reviews.review_description: Good fun and cool graphics ..i like that its a bit different from other aim and shoot games.

I liked this game. I got a little spooked a couple times and it is not gonna be a breeze through. I didn’t like the fact that if you die you have to start over and you only stand in one spot the entire time, but good luck because again it’s tricky and it is also near impossible to make it to the end without having to start over. I’m sure someone has though.
